---
title: "David Jackson-Perry"
subtitle: "PhD"
people_group: "any"
email: "David.Jackson-Perry@chuv.ch"
page-layout: full
image: davidJackson.jpeg
about:
  id: about
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image: davidJackson.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:David.Jackson-Perry@chuv.ch
    - icon: link
      text: Weitere Informationen
      href: https://pure.qub.ac.uk/en/persons/david-jackson-perry
---
